center.name: 印度尼西亞島嶼列表
center.summary: 印度尼西亞島嶼列表是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括Spotted nightjar、Sunda frogmouth、Sumba hornbill等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The ashy-bellied white-eye (Zosterops citrinella) is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae found in the Lesser Sunda Islands in the Indonesian Archipelago and northern Cape York Peninsula in Queensland, Australia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits much of mainland Australia and has also been found in several Indonesian islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Mai 1897 in Dresden|journal=Journal für Ornithologie|date=1897|volume=45|issue=4|page=513|doi=10.1007/BF02207249|s2cid=8223540|url=https://www.biodiversitylibrary.org/part/142546 }} The title page of the volume has 1897 but the article was not published until 1898. | synonyms = Aceros everetti }} Sumba hornbill (), or known natively as Julang (in Sumba languages) is a large bird belonging to the family of , endemic and native to the Indonesian island of Sumba

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: cornutus is found in Sumatra, the Indonesian islands Bangka and Belitung, as well as Banggi island and Borneo

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The species inhabits a single island, Karakelong, in the Indonesian archipelago, although it was formerly found on the Sangihe Islands and other parts of the Talaud Islands
